name: tier2-ghost
description: Ghost in the Machine — build + test orchestration for the Tier 2.5 µLM

scripts.build:wasm: cd wasm && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && cp target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/tier2_kernel.wasm ../dist/
scripts.build:ts: cd ts && npx tsc -p tsconfig.transformer.json && cp dist/tier2_transformer.js ../dist/
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
